name: jira-search-issues
description: Search Jira Cloud issues using JQL. Requires a vault:// reference to an Atlassian OAuth access token in the AUTH_HEADER config key. Returns structured issue data (key, summary, status, assignee, priority, type, updated).

JQL.description: Jira Query Language expression (e.g. 'project = SECP ORDER BY updated DESC')

CLOUD_ID.description: Atlassian Cloud instance ID (UUID from accessible-resources)

AUTH_HEADER.description: vault:// path to the OAuth access token (e.g. vault://oauth/atlassian/{user_id}/{cloud_id}/access_token). The host resolves this and prepends 'Bearer ' automatically.

MAX_RESULTS.description: Maximum number of issues to return (1-100)
